title: Slovakian Sweet Gnocchi
description: A traditional Slovakian dish made with sweet potatoes and served with a fragrant sauce.
instructions: Boil chopped sweet potatoes in a large pot of salted water until tender.
Drain the water and let the sweet potatoes cool.
Mash the sweet potatoes and mix with flour until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until smooth.
Divide the dough into 4 equal pieces and roll each piece into a long rope.
Cut the rope into 1-inch pieces to form the gnocchi.
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the gnocchi until they float.
Drain the gnocchi and serve with a fragrant sauce made from fermented butter and parsley.
Season with Slovakian salt and serve hot.
